notes: I don't know, it loads, and after loading, it stays on a black screen; only the game name and version appear in the bottom right corner, but the game doesn't load.
The game starts perfectly fine, then shows a black screen.

So, I just gave it a try becouse why not. The initial splash screen is fine, it loads the game, but the moment the login screen should appear, you will get a black or white screen depending on proton version. The cause of it is very laughable, THE GAME STILL RELIES ON INTERNET EXPLORER TO LOGIN. Yes, even tho they created a full unity client, they left the login window as an embeded browser.
